title: Better Than Vanilla
description: Minecraft - Better Than Vanilla is a lightweight and optimized modpack inspired by the Action and Stuff resource pack and the Realism Craft addon for Bedrock Edition.
body:
Minecraft - Better Than Vanilla is a lightweight and optimized modpack inspired by the Action and Stuff resource pack and the Realism Craft addon for Bedrock Edition. 



One of the standout features is the new running animation, where a trail of smoke appears behind the player’s feet, adding a dynamic and immersive feel to movement.
![New particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cmDLcKBl/images/045ba3ac2fdd6cfe8591dbf9bcd7db346f526ecc.png)

It enhances your Vanilla Minecraft experience by introducing animated grass, brand-new particle effects, and custom animations for both mobs and players. 


Here's the new water particles—when you fall into water, realistic splashes appear, and as you move, subtle ripples and water droplets form around you, making the underwater experience more immersive.

![Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cmDLcKBl/images/5b1b332829a5100d34bdf99650e34df739887125.png)
Whether you're looking for smoother gameplay or subtle visual improvements, this modpack is perfect for a Vanilla+ experience, delivering both performance and aesthetic upgrades without compromising the core gameplay.



Try Minecraft - Better Than Vanilla out and discover all the new aesthetic enhancements that will make your world feel more immersive and alive!
